scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @noctification/api && npm run build --workspace @noctification/web
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.check:core: npm run typecheck --workspace @noctification/apr-core && npm run test --workspace @noctification/apr-core
scripts.check:api: npm run lint --workspace @noctification/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @noctification/api && npm run test --workspace @noctification/api
scripts.check:web: npm run lint --workspace @noctification/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @noctification/web && npm run test --workspace @noctification/web
scripts.check:fast: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:core
